title: Thoma Bravo Completes Acquisition of Dayforce
author: Globe Newswire
description: Thoma Bravo, the world's largest software-focused investment firm, has completed its acquisition of Dayforce, Inc. for approximately US$12.3 billion. Dayforce stockholders received US$70.00 per share in cash. The company's stock has been delisted from the NYSE and TSX. Thoma Bravo plans to support Dayforce's growth in AI-powered HCM technology and expand its market reach.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Acquisition completed at $70 per share with backing from major private equity firm Thoma Bravo. Leadership expresses confidence in scaling business and driving innovation with new ownership support. Access to Thoma Bravo's resources and expertise positions company for growth in AI-driven HCM market.

title: Deal Dispatch: Warner Bros., Bill.com, C3 AI—Key Auctions And Buyouts Shake The Market
author: Anthony Noto
description: Multiple companies are exploring potential sales and acquisitions, including Bill.com, C3 AI, Warner Bros. Discovery, and Sealed Air. Major tech, media, and private equity firms are actively bidding and considering strategic moves in various sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is exploring potential sale following activist investor pressure, indicating potential strategic repositioning
Exploring sale after CEO resignation, suggesting potential organizational transition
Attracting multiple high-profile bidders like Paramount, Comcast, and Netflix, indicating strong market interest
Stock jumped over 20% on potential takeover news by Clayton Dubilier & Rice
Stockholders approved acquisition by Thoma Bravo at $70 per share

title: Dayforce Stockholders Approve Acquisition by Thoma Bravo
author: Globe Newswire
description: Dayforce stockholders voted to approve the acquisition by Thoma Bravo, with approximately 88.4% of votes cast supporting the transaction. The deal is expected to close in late 2025 or early 2026, with stockholders receiving $70.00 per share in cash.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company leadership views the acquisition as an opportunity to accelerate business, deepen customer impact, and drive innovation

title: BRODSKY & SMITH SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: Notifying Investors of the Following Investigations: 89bio, Inc. (Nasdaq - ETNB), Barinthus Biotherapeutics plc (Nasdaq - BRNS), Verint Systems Inc. (Nasdaq - VRNT), Dayforce, Inc. (NYSE- DAY)
author: Brodsky & Smith
description: Law firm Brodsky & Smith is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by boards of several companies during merger and acquisition processes, questioning whether shareholders are receiving fair value.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Potential breach of fiduciary duties in Roche acquisition, questioning fairness of $14.50 per share cash offer plus contingent value right
Merger with Clywedog Therapeutics being investigated for potential unfair deal structure and shareholder value
Thoma Bravo acquisition at $70.00 per share is below 52-week high of $82.69, suggesting potential undervaluation
Thoma Bravo cash offer of $20.50 per share is significantly below 52-week high of $34.80, indicating potential undervaluation

title: 16th Annual Dayforce Pulse of Talent: 71% of Workers Untrained in AI as Adoption and Expectations Surge
author: Amy Cappellanti-Wolf
description: A survey of nearly 7,000 workers reveals a significant AI skills gap, with 71% of workers untrained in AI despite 63% believing AI skill development is important. Executives are leading AI adoption at 87%, while only 27% of workers are using AI, highlighting a critical need for workforce AI training and responsible AI governance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is proactively identifying and addressing the AI skills gap in the workforce, demonstrating awareness but not yet solving the problem completely
